---
title: "Julla basics"
format: html
engine: julia
---


## Setup

### DataFrames

```{julia}
using DataFrames
```

### DuckDB

```{julia}
using DuckDB
```

### Arrow

```{julia}
using Arrow
```

### PostgreSQL

```{julia}
using LibPQ
```

## Creating

TODO

## Importing data

TODO

## Subsetting

TODO

## Sorting

TODO

## Modifying

TODO
